## SnippetCallbacks class

This component subscribes to any [XEvent](./x-components.xevent.md) with a custom callbacks provided by the snippet configuration.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class SnippetCallbacks extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue
